commands.review_summary:
The PR changes OpenAI backend realtime session payloads, Discord realtime speaker-turn closure, and Discord raw PCM playback buffering to stabilize Discord VC with OpenAI realtime voice.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR gives concrete live Discord VC steps and redacted logs for repeated gpt-realtime-2/cedar turns, and current-main source shows the old backend payload, immediate playback path, and no trailing-silence guard.
